title: Void Respawn
description: teleports any entity falling into the Void in the End back to the Overworld
body:
yet another essential mod that prevents entitys from dying in the Void when falling in the End. entitys are safely teleported back to the Overworld

Any entitys fall below Y = -60 in the End are automatically teleported to the Overworld at same postion Y = 1024.

Supports Entities: Works for players and optionally other entities like mobs or items.


feel free to use on modpacks
